title: Living Paper Results Manifest
description: Schema for the single source of truth for all numeric claims. Every entry traces back to a specific experiment output.

last_updated_by.description: Agent or script that last wrote

additionalProperties.description: A category of results (e.g., composition, selection, quality)

value.description: The numeric value or formatted string (e.g., '<0.001')

unit.description: Unit or type: %, count, ρ, p-value, F, d, ×, etc.

source.description: Relative path to the JSON/script that produced this value

experiment_id.description: Unique experiment run ID for provenance

rules: Category = top-level key (snake_case): composition, selection, quality, price_quality, redemption, temporal, cross_pool, depositor
Metric = second-level key (snake_case): e.g., renewable_pct_tonnes, selection_coefficient
When a metric has sub-variants, use suffixes: _lo, _hi, _preterra, _full, _weighted
P-values that are bounds use string format: '<0.001', '<10^-5'
